title: How to check for duplicate column values
excerpt:
we are looking for a way to ensure unique values in one board’s text column. 
we could settle for just having an alert when the value is the same on both items

posts.author: meti_integration (Jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
we are looking for a way to ensure unique values in one board’s text column.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @meti_integration,
You might be interested in the Duplicates and Uniques app. You can achieve what you want and so much more. If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
